actions.value:
To help us identify what happened please answer the following questions. 

 

  1. What is the username of the account?
  2. What is the country/city/state that you normally log into the account from?
  3. Did you ever store your username/password in an email, cloud, or have it physically written down somewhere?
  4. Do you have notifications enabled for Edge?
  5. Have you ever signed into another device?
  6. Does anyone else such as family or friends have access to the device or account?
  7. Have you ever revealed the Master Private Seed or private keys of the wallet and written it down somewhere or save it in an email or cloud?
  8. Is your username and password the same as some other websites or social media that you use?
  9. Did you make any transactions around the time of the compromise? 
  10. If you go to https://haveibeenpwned.com/ and enter your email address there, does it indicate that your email has been leaked at any point?
  11. Did you have 2FA enabled on your account? This would have prevented any unknown logins from any device except your own physical device
  12. Was your account initially created on the Edge app or some other app such as Airbitz or Bitcoin of America etc.?
  13. Was the account completely EMPTIED out, meaning you have 0 or very close to 0 balance? Or do you still have a significant balance left in the account?

 

If you believe your account has been compromised please stop using the account and move funds to a new Edge account. If the account was compromised the private keys could also be compromised.
